title: 提示词-总控-系统主控执行引擎

title: Aider
summary: AI Pair Programming in Your Terminal. Aider allows you to edit code in your local git repository using LLMs.

title: AutoGen
summary: AutoGen is a framework for creating multi-agent AI applications that can act autonomously or work alongside humans.

title: Browser-use
summary: Make websites accessible for AI agents.

title: CrewAI
summary: CrewAI is a cutting-edge framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents.

title: LangChain
summary: LangChain is a framework for developing applications powered by large language models (LLMs).

title: LlamaIndex
summary: LlamaIndex (formerly GPT Index) is a data framework for your LLM applications. It provides the tools to build agentic applications over your data.

title: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
summary: 🔌 MCP (Model Context Protocol)

title: Mem0
summary: Mem0 enhances AI assistants and agents with an intelligent memory layer, enabling personalized AI interactions.

title: MetaGPT
summary: The Multi-Agent Framework: First AI Software Company, Towards Natural Language Programming.

title: OpenHands
summary: OpenHands (formerly OpenDevin) is an AI-driven development environment that aims to provide a powerful, open-source alternative to commercial coding agents.

title: SWE-Agent
summary: SWE-agent enables your language model of choice to autonomously use tools to fix issues in real GitHub repositories.
